name: Anime.js v3
description: Lightweight JS animation engine for CSS properties, SVG, DOM attributes and JS objects. Timeline API, staggering, spring physics, keyframes — fully MIT, zero restrictions.
head: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/animejs@3.2.2/lib/anime.min.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  // Anime.js stagger entrance on section cards
  anime({
    targets: '.your-card-selector',
    translateY: [40, 0],
    opacity: [0, 1],
    delay: anime.stagger(80),
    duration: 700,
    easing: 'easeOutExpo',
    autoplay: false
  });
  // Trigger on scroll with IntersectionObserver
  var section = document.querySelector('.your-section');
  if (section && window.IntersectionObserver) {
    new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
      if (entries[0].isIntersecting) { anime({ targets: '.your-card-selector', translateY: [40,0], opacity:[0,1], delay: anime.stagger(80), duration: 700, easing: 'easeOutExpo' }); }
    }, { threshold: 0.15 }).observe(section);
  }
})();
</script>
